headline: J.B. Hunt works with Overroute to launch freight execution platform
summary: Following a co-design with J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Overroute publicly debuted its AI-native freight execution platform for enterprise carriers on Tuesday. The post J.B. Hunt works with Overroute to launch freight execution platform appeared first on FreightWaves.

raw.headline: J.B. Hunt works with Overroute to launch freight execution platform
raw.summary: Following a co-design with J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Overroute publicly debuted its AI-native freight execution platform for enterprise carriers on Tuesday. The post J.B. Hunt works with Overroute to launch freight execution platform appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: Overroute Launches with J.B. Hunt To Streamline Freight Execution for Enterprise Carriers
summary: LOWELL, Ark., July 21, 2026--Overroute, an AI-native freight technology company built for carriers and logistics operators, today announced its public launch after a year of co-design with J.B. Hunt Transport Services Inc. (Nasdaq: JBHT), one of the largest supply chain solutions providers in North America.
